research_question: Investigate the role of BRAF V600E mutation in melanoma drug resistance. Focus on molecular mechanisms of acquired resistance to BRAF inhibitors (vemurafenib, dabrafenib) and identify potential combination therapy targets through computational analysis.

papers.title: ) have begun to quantitatively predict resistance evolution, offering opportunities for computational integration. However, critical gaps remain in understanding non-genetic resistance mechanisms, spatial tumor heterogeneity, and the tumor-immune microenvironment interplay in resistance development
) remain incompletely characterized, including the role of chromatin remodeling and transcription factor network rewiring
